items.translated_title: Hacked, leaked, and held for ransom: the worst breaches of 2026 so far

images.alt: Demonstrators gather outside of the Office of Personnel Management in Washington, D.C. on February 7, 2025 to protest federal layoffs and demand the termination of Elon Musk from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). A redacted screenshot of the message ShinyHunters left on the hacked login pages of Instructure's platform Canvas.
